description:
Create, play back and print beautiful sheet music with free and easy to use music notation software MuseScore.


MuseScore Studio 4.7.2 is now available!
This update builds on the recent 4.7.2 patch with further stability improvements during startup. It also contains a number of minor fixes for page numbers, bends, piano pedal line hooks, and chord symbols, as well as various musicxml import/export enhancements.
Learn about all the new features in version 4.7, including many new engraving tools, significant workflow improvements, helpful new guitar features, and important upgrades to the audio engine.
For more information, see the 4.7.2 GitHub Project.
